attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-RHEUM-03-00231 — SEQ is provisional (derived from source AMS-031); maintainer / ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-RHEUM-03 bucket.
Age not stated in the source note — inferred as 56 (age_band adult) as a conservative plausible value; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex at birth not stated in the source note — inferred as female (a required schema field); please confirm on clinician review.

difficulty_tier set to red_herring_laden and diagnosis_category to important_not_to_miss: the case's clinical weight is the septic-arthritis mimic/over-triage trap, not the benign primary diagnosis — reviewer may prefer 'common' for the primary. Flagged for confirmation.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person home visit. Clinician-measured vitals (BP 135/85, HR 95, Temp 36.8, RR 18, SpO2 100%), palpation for joint warmth/fluctuance, passive micro-motion testing and prior RF/CCP serology were sealed into nodes 10/11 as clinician-only findings; patient-observable proxies (visible puffiness, self-touch warmth, self-reported afebrile status, self-reported weight) were offered in 01.objective_data_offered with verified:false.

De-anchoring applied (§5/§6): the patient's prior formal label of mild seronegative rheumatoid arthritis and the negative RF/CCP serology were sealed to nodes 10/11; the presentation layer carries only a lay account of long-standing intermittent finger aches so the diagnostic label is not handed to the AI Doctor.

Ibuprofen dose_route_frequency taken verbatim from the source ('ibuprofen 400mg'); ongoing frequency NOT invented — deferred to the GP. Paracetamol dosing left to standard OTC directions (no dose synthesised).
Several SNOMED/ICD-10-AM/AMT codes are best-effort candidates only and unverified; the viral-arthropathy SNOMED (240370009) is flagged low-confidence. All await terminology-server receipts.
No allergies, family history or NOK given in the source — empty/omitted rather than guessed; contact_nok.available set false (lives alone).

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
